posts.author: Stephen.Ellis (Stephen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

We love that timeline boxes can be coloured based on the status, its so useful to us, however our items have multiple statuses so it would be great if we could colour the box based on 1 status and the outline based on another.

For example, the dev status would be “placeholder, scheduled, in development, ready for E2E, Done”

However we also have another status like: “has a dependency, is a dependency” so that team can understand if moving the item is likely to impact other teams or not

What are you trying to achieve

Better clarity on whether items can be moved on a timeline view without impacting the whole plan.
